subject: fix(export): bump PDF capture to 3x resolution and 95% JPEG quality
body:
2x may not be sharp enough for all use cases, especially larger formats
and print. 3x provides genuinely crisp output while JPEG compression
keeps file size well below the old PNG approach. Also bumped JPEG quality
from 0.92 to 0.95 since the compression savings already handle file size.

Tags: export, pdf, quality
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: export
Semver: patch

title: bump PDF capture to 3x resolution and 95% JPEG quality
